meta.title: Why AI governance is about trust, not just technology
meta.description:
“Don’t silence our voices.”

Andrew Ng on why AI governance is also about earning trust, listening to concerns, and understanding how AI affects people’s lives and work.

These are the conversations we make space for at AI Dev.

Join us at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29.
🎟️ https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
